sn46.51:0.3: Sutta Food (for the Factors for awakening)
sn46.51:1.2: “Monks, I will teach you the feeding & starving of the five hindrances & of the seven factors for awakening.
sn46.51:1.3: Listen & pay close attention. I will speak.…
sn46.51:1.4: [Feeding the hindrances] “And what is the food for the arising of unarisen sensual desire, or for the growth & increase of sensual desire once it has arisen?
sn46.51:1.5: There is the theme of beauty.
sn46.51:1.6: To foster inappropriate attention to it:
sn46.51:1.7: This is the food for the arising of unarisen sensual desire, or for the growth & increase of sensual desire once it has arisen.
sn46.51:2.1: “And what is the food for the arising of unarisen ill will, or for the growth & increase of ill will once it has arisen?
sn46.51:2.2: There is the theme of irritation.
sn46.51:2.3: To foster inappropriate attention to it:
sn46.51:2.4: This is the food for the arising of unarisen ill will, or for the growth & increase of ill will once it has arisen.
sn46.51:3.1: “And what is the food for the arising of unarisen sloth & drowsiness, or for the growth & increase of sloth & drowsiness once it has arisen?
sn46.51:3.2: There are boredom, weariness, yawning, drowsiness after a meal, & sluggishness of awareness.
sn46.51:3.3: To foster inappropriate attention to them:
sn46.51:3.4: This is the food for the arising of unarisen sloth & drowsiness, or for the growth & increase of sloth & drowsiness once it has arisen.
sn46.51:4.1: “And what is the food for the arising of unarisen restlessness & anxiety, or for the growth & increase of restlessness & anxiety once it has arisen?
sn46.51:4.3: To foster inappropriate attention to that:
sn46.51:4.4: This is the food for the arising of unarisen restlessness & anxiety, or for the growth & increase of restlessness & anxiety once it has arisen.
sn46.51:5.1: “And what is the food for the arising of unarisen uncertainty, or for the growth & increase of uncertainty once it has arisen?
sn46.51:5.2: There are phenomena that act as a foothold for uncertainty.
sn46.51:5.3: To foster inappropriate attention to them:
sn46.51:5.4: This is the food for the arising of unarisen uncertainty, or for the growth & increase of uncertainty once it has arisen.
sn46.51:6.1: [Feeding the factors for awakening] “Now, what is the food for the arising of unarisen mindfulness as a factor for awakening, or for the growth & increase of mindfulness as a factor for awakening once it has arisen?
sn46.51:6.2: There are mental qualities that act as a foothold for mindfulness as a factor for awakening [well-purified virtue & views made straight].
sn46.51:6.3: To foster appropriate attention to them:
sn46.51:6.4: This is the food for the arising of unarisen mindfulness as a factor for awakening, or for the growth & increase of mindfulness as a factor for awakening once it has arisen.
sn46.51:7.1: “And what is the food for the arising of unarisen analysis of qualities as a factor for awakening, or for the growth & increase of analysis of qualities… once it has arisen?
sn46.51:7.2: There are mental qualities that are skillful & unskillful, blameworthy & blameless, gross & refined, siding with darkness & with light.
sn46.51:7.3: To foster appropriate attention to them:
sn46.51:7.4: This is the food for the arising of unarisen analysis of qualities as a factor for awakening, or for the growth & increase of analysis of qualities… once it has arisen.
sn46.51:8.1: “And what is the food for the arising of unarisen persistence as a factor for awakening, or for the growth & increase of persistence… once it has arisen?
sn46.51:8.2: There is the potential for effort, the potential for exertion, the potential for striving.
sn46.51:8.3: To foster appropriate attention to them:
sn46.51:8.4: This is the food for the arising of unarisen persistence as a factor for awakening, or for the growth & increase of persistence… once it has arisen.
sn46.51:9.1: “And what is the food for the arising of unarisen rapture as a factor for awakening, or for the growth & increase of rapture… once it has arisen?
sn46.51:9.2: There are mental qualities that act as a foothold for rapture as a factor for awakening.
sn46.51:9.3: To foster appropriate attention to them:
sn46.51:9.4: This is the food for the arising of unarisen rapture as a factor for awakening, or for the growth & increase of rapture… once it has arisen.
sn46.51:10.1: “And what is the food for the arising of unarisen calm as a factor for awakening, or for the growth & increase of calm… once it has arisen?
sn46.51:10.2: There is physical calm & there is mental calm.
sn46.51:10.3: To foster appropriate attention to them:
sn46.51:10.4: This is the food for the arising of unarisen calm as a factor for awakening, or for the growth & increase of calm… once it has arisen.
sn46.51:11.1: “And what is the food for the arising of unarisen concentration as a factor for awakening, or for the growth & increase of concentration… once it has arisen?
sn46.51:11.2: There are themes for tranquility, themes for non-distraction [these are the four establishings of mindfulness—see MN 44].
sn46.51:11.3: To foster appropriate attention to them:
sn46.51:11.4: This is the food for the arising of unarisen concentration as a factor for awakening, or for the growth & increase of concentration… once it has arisen.
sn46.51:12.1: “And what is the food for the arising of unarisen equanimity as a factor for awakening, or for the growth & increase of equanimity… once it has arisen?
sn46.51:12.2: There are mental qualities that act as a foothold for equanimity as a factor for awakening.
sn46.51:12.3: To foster appropriate attention to them:
sn46.51:12.4: This is the food for the arising of unarisen equanimity as a factor for awakening, or for the growth & increase of equanimity as a factor for awakening once it has arisen.
sn46.51:13.1: [Starving the hindrances] “Now, what is lack of food for the arising of unarisen sensual desire, or for the growth & increase of sensual desire once it has arisen?
sn46.51:13.2: There is the theme of unattractiveness.
sn46.51:13.3: To foster appropriate attention to it:
sn46.51:13.4: This is lack of food for the arising of unarisen sensual desire, or for the growth & increase of sensual desire once it has arisen.
sn46.51:14.1: “And what is lack of food for the arising of unarisen ill will, or for the growth & increase of ill will once it has arisen?
sn46.51:14.2: There is awareness-release [through goodwill, compassion, empathetic joy, or equanimity].
sn46.51:14.3: To foster appropriate attention to that:
sn46.51:14.4: This is lack of food for the arising of unarisen ill will, or for the growth & increase of ill will once it has arisen.
sn46.51:15.1: “And what is lack of food for the arising of unarisen sloth & drowsiness, or for the growth & increase of sloth & drowsiness once it has arisen?
sn46.51:15.2: There is the potential for effort, the potential for exertion, the potential for striving.
sn46.51:15.3: To foster appropriate attention to them:
sn46.51:15.4: This is lack of food for the arising of unarisen sloth & drowsiness, or for the growth & increase of sloth & drowsiness once it has arisen.
sn46.51:16.1: “And what is lack of food for the arising of unarisen restlessness & anxiety, or for the growth & increase of restlessness & anxiety once it has arisen?
sn46.51:16.3: To foster appropriate attention to that:
sn46.51:16.4: This is lack of food for the arising of unarisen restlessness & anxiety, or for the growth & increase of restlessness & anxiety once it has arisen.
sn46.51:17.1: “And what is lack of food for the arising of unarisen uncertainty, or for the growth & increase of uncertainty once it has arisen?
sn46.51:17.2: There are mental qualities that are skillful & unskillful, blameworthy & blameless, gross & refined, siding with darkness & with light.
sn46.51:17.3: To foster appropriate attention to them:
sn46.51:17.4: This is lack of food for the arising of unarisen uncertainty, or for the growth & increase of uncertainty once it has arisen.
sn46.51:18.1: [Starving the factors for awakening] “Now, what is lack of food for the arising of unarisen mindfulness as a factor for awakening, or for the growth & increase of mindfulness as a factor for awakening once it has arisen?
sn46.51:18.2: There are mental qualities that act as a foothold for mindfulness as a factor for awakening.
sn46.51:18.4: This is lack of food for the arising of unarisen mindfulness as a factor for awakening, or for the growth & increase of mindfulness as a factor for awakening once it has arisen.
sn46.51:19.1: “And what is lack of food for the arising of unarisen analysis of qualities as a factor for awakening, or for the growth & increase of analysis of qualities… once it has arisen?
sn46.51:19.2: There are mental qualities that are skillful & unskillful, blameworthy & blameless, gross & refined, siding with darkness & with light.
sn46.51:19.4: This is lack of food for the arising of unarisen analysis of qualities as a factor for awakening, or for the growth & increase of analysis of qualities… once it has arisen.
sn46.51:20.1: “And what is lack of food for the arising of unarisen persistence as a factor for awakening, or for the growth & increase of persistence… once it has arisen?
sn46.51:20.2: There is the potential for effort, the potential for exertion, the potential for striving.
sn46.51:20.4: This is lack of food for the arising of unarisen persistence as a factor for awakening, or for the growth & increase of persistence… once it has arisen.
sn46.51:21.1: “And what is lack of food for the arising of unarisen rapture as a factor for awakening, or for the growth & increase of rapture… once it has arisen?
sn46.51:21.2: There are mental qualities that act as a foothold for rapture as a factor for awakening.
sn46.51:21.4: This is lack of food for the arising of unarisen rapture as a factor for awakening, or for the growth & increase of rapture… once it has arisen.
sn46.51:22.1: “And what is lack of food for the arising of unarisen calm as a factor for awakening, or for the growth & increase of calm… once it has arisen?
sn46.51:22.2: There is physical calm & there is mental calm.
sn46.51:22.4: This is lack of food for the arising of unarisen calm as a factor for awakening, or for the growth & increase of calm… once it has arisen.
sn46.51:23.1: “And what is lack of food for the arising of unarisen concentration as a factor for awakening, or for the growth & increase of concentration… once it has arisen?
sn46.51:23.2: There are the themes for tranquility, themes for non-distraction.
sn46.51:23.4: This is lack of food for the arising of unarisen concentration as a factor for awakening, or for the growth & increase of concentration… once it has arisen.
sn46.51:24.1: “And what is lack of food for the arising of unarisen equanimity as a factor for awakening, or for the growth & increase of equanimity as a factor for awakening once it has arisen?
sn46.51:24.2: There are mental qualities that act as a foothold for equanimity as a factor for awakening.
sn46.51:24.4: This is lack of food for the arising of unarisen equanimity as a factor for awakening, or for the growth & increase of equanimity as a factor for awakening once it has arisen.”
